title: Inventory glacial melt and water data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory separating glacier monitoring, climate projections, water demand, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, date, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Compare glacial melt projections across models and scenarios
outcome: A basin-scale comparison of melt-rate projections from multiple climate model ensembles with uncertainty ranges.
validation_method: Replicator reruns comparison with alternative model subset and confirms divergence patterns.
done_condition: Projection comparison includes at least three model ensembles and multiple scenarios.

title: Rank river basins by compound water-security risk
outcome: A risk ranking combining melt projections, precipitation change, and downstream demand growth.
validation_method: Replicator confirms ranking robustness to alternative weightings.
done_condition: Risk ranking includes explicit methodology, scenario uncertainty, and sensitivity testing with replication.

title: Red-team misuse of water-security projections
outcome: Failure-mode review identifying transboundary conflict and maladaptation risks.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms mitigations or blocks publication, then replicated.
done_condition: Every operational claim qualified or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match basin water management decision needs
outcome: Field-facing review of whether risk rankings would change water planning responsibly.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, timing, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Output has named user, named decision, non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review.
